_schema: Each entry matches an installed app by exeName (case-insensitive, without .exe), aumid, or shellParseName. Arguments are suggestions shown in the editor; checking a chip appends the flag to the Args field. Set needsValue=true when the flag expects user-supplied data (path, ID, name) — the editor will immediately open the chip in edit mode with the cursor ready for the value. Only add entries with flags that have been personally verified to work — no guessing.
